title: Reading
description: One plant reading as the Verdant mock API returns it (fictional demo data). The shape stat-tile binds — display values only, deliberately not a sensor API. plantId references a Plant (plant-card.contract.json) by id; the screen selects the featured plant's moisture + light pair.

plantId.description: id of the plant this reading belongs to

kind.description: which reading — selects the tile glyph

value.description: already scaled for display; the tile does no conversion

label.description: human name of the reading, e.g. "Moisture"
